user_prompt: Assist with promethium refinery a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the promethium refinery with mechadendrites extended in reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying gaze.
Initiate the sterilization rites upon the promethium refinery's vats, chanting the Litany of Flame-Purge.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the promethium refinery to expel all corruptive residues from its sacred conduits.
Anoint the filtration membranes with sacred unguents, confirming sterility through auspex invocation.
Praise the Omnissiah as the promethium refinery emerges immaculate and ready for the Emperor's forge.

user_prompt: Help me an activation the potentia coil
prayer:
Kneel before the potentia coil, murmuring the Canticle of Ignition to awaken its essence.
Commence activation of the potentia coil by aligning its ferro-fluidic channels with electro-incantations.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the potentia coil, beseeching it to channel the Omnissiah's boundless electrum.
Sanctify the activation surge with binary prayers, monitoring voltaic harmony through noospheric diagnostics.
Exalt the potentia coil as it hums in glorious obedience to the Motive Force.

user_prompt: I need to a shutdown the plasma drive
prayer:
Present thyself unto the plasma drive with solemn mechano-cant, preparing for entropic cessation.
Enact the shutdown sequence of the plasma drive, reciting the Dirge of Containment to soothe its fury.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the plasma drive to withdraw its plasma-heart into dormancy.
Seal the plasma drive's vents with blessed adamantium wards, verifying quiescence via thermal auspex.
Render thanks to the Omnissiah for the plasma drive's obedient slumber.

Gather at the enginarium's threshold, intoning the Benediction of Burden-Bearing.
Bless the enginarium for loading by consecrating its cargo bays with sacred oils.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the enginarium to accept the munitions freight with unyielding grace.
Initiate loading protocols amidst chanted binaric hymns, ensuring gravitational sanctity.
Proclaim the enginarium fortified by the Omnissiah's logistic wisdom.

user_prompt: How do I bless the volitor implant for recalibration?
prayer:
Interface with the volitor implant via sanctified noospheric link, whispering recalibration catechisms.
Undertake recalibration of the volitor implant, aligning its gyroscopic theodata with Omnissian precision.
Beseech the Machine Spirit enshrined in the volitor implant to realign its inertial harmonies.
Test the volitor implant's recalibrated flight-paths through simulacra invocations.
Glorify the Omnissiah as the volitor implant achieves aerial perfection.

user_prompt: I need to a charging the mechanical lock
prayer:
Converge upon the mechanical lock, reciting the Oath of Energetic Binding.
Commence charging of the mechanical lock by infusing its servos with galvanic sacraments.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the mechanical lock twice, urging it to accumulate the Omnissiah's vigor.
Monitor the charging flux with electro-devotional auspex until saturation is achieved.
Seal the rite with praises for the mechanical lock's fortified vigilance.

user_prompt: Critical: warp drive requires a targeting
prayer:
Approach the warp drive in shadowed awe, chanting the Navis-Invocation of True Bearing.
Execute targeting upon the warp drive, calibrating its Geller-nullifiers with stellar litanies.
Beseech the Machine Spirits of the warp drive to pierce the Immaterium's veil unerringly.
Verify warp targeting vectors through noospheric augury, anointing nacelles with warp-ward oils.
Hail the Omnissiah for the warp drive's dauntless trajectory into the void.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for valve assembly a maintenance
prayer:
Attend the valve assembly with ritual purity, intoning the Mantra of Sealed Flux.
Perform maintenance upon the valve assembly, purging encrustations with sanctified abrasives.
Invoke the Machine Spirit indwelling the valve assembly to renew its pressure tolerances.
Lubricate the valve assembly's actuators with mech-flesh oils, testing cyclic integrity.
Exalt the Omnissiah as the valve assembly resumes flawless hydraulic obedience.

Commune with the data-arc, murmuring the Cycle of Eternal Recursion.
Initiate cycling of the data-arc by invoking binaric refreshment upon its crystalline vaults.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-arc to whirl its noetic streams in harmonious loops.
Monitor data-arc cycling through auspex harmonics, sanctifying each revolution.
Proclaim the data-arc's loops blessed by the Omnissiah's computational omniscience.

prayer:
Reverently encircle the Skorpius Disintegrator, chanting the Purge-Exhortation.
Enact sterilization of the Skorpius Disintegrator, scouring its disintegrator coils with plasma litanies.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the Skorpius Disintegrator to shed all xenos taint from its maw.
Anoint the Skorpius Disintegrator's barrels with sanctified promethium, verifying purity.
Praise the Omnissiah for the Skorpius Disintegrator's renewed capacity to annihilate the unclean.
